title: User
description: Entity (person, organization, institution, etc.) that is requesting data or information with certain characteristics described by needs and/or requirements.

definitions.definition: In the context of the KCEO, entity (person, organization, institution, etc.) that is requesting data or information with certain characteristics described by needs and/or requirements.
External person, institution or system that consumes provided services.
definitions.notes: - Includes Data Access or Science and Service Exploitation Platforms provided by a payload data ground segment.
